commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `octopool login` error formatting, CLI tests, README/CLI docs, and CHANGELOG text so `caller_not_provisioned` explains the required admin grant command.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main has no special `caller_not_provisioned` handling, while the API and tests already use that code for unprovisioned callers. I did not run the CLI or tests because this review is read-only.
